settings.guarantee_card_heading: 30-Day Fit Guarantee: Free Remakes If It's Not Right
settings.guarantee_card_text: If your veneers don't fit or look right, we remake them free (up to twice) within 30 days of delivery, with a prepaid label. Because each set is custom-made to your mouth, finished veneers aren't eligible for a change-of-mind or satisfaction refund. You can cancel for a full refund any time before we begin production.

settings.image_alt: Dr. Brandon Turley standing in his dental practice in front of a wall of patient smile photos
settings.content:
You stopped smiling in photos years ago. You laugh with a hand over your mouth. You looked into fixing it, but $15,000 in a dental chair wasn't the answer.

So I designed one. This is the other way.

settings.quote: "I'm in sales, so confidence is everything, now I can feel myself smiling without even trying."
"I want to cry. I really do. I feel like I could go out and smile."
"I got so many compliments on my new smile, nobody could tell they were snap-in veneers. They look that natural."
"I've never seen my teeth that straight. Is this a dream?"

settings.heading: Real reactions, unscripted.
settings.subheading: First-impression reactions from real customers. No scripts, no incentives, no edits.

settings.title: 7-Point Protocol Creator

settings.quote: Most snap-on veneers are an embarrassment. I built one that isn't.
settings.body_content:
Most snap-on veneers are cheaply manufactured plastic, shipped from factories by companies without a practicing dentist on the team.

Patients walk into my practice wearing them. Within a month, they stop. They're embarrassed by something they paid for.

That's the gap Revive fills. Every case is designed against my 7-Point Smile Design Protocol. If it doesn't pass, it doesn't ship. If it arrives and isn't right, we remake it. My name is on this because I built it.
settings.founder_clarity: I'm a cosmetic dentist, but I'm not your dentist. I designed a product.
settings.doctor_title: Doctor of Dental Surgery · Founder, Revive Teeth
settings.video_caption: Dr. Brandon Turley, DDS · 1 min 52 sec

settings.heading: A better smile, mailed to your door.
settings.description: No dental chair, no drilling, no multiple visits. Three simple steps, mostly from your couch. Every case is designed to Dr. Turley's 7-Point Smile Design Protocol along the way.

settings.title: Smile Architecture
settings.description: Your veneers are shaped to suit your face, not a template. Your lip line and facial proportions guide the design.
settings.svg_code: <svg viewbox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M50 13C33 13 24 30 24 49c0 21 13 38 26 38s26-17 26-38C76 30 67 13 50 13Z"></path><line x1="50" y1="16" x2="50" y2="84" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 3" opacity=".32"></line><line x1="27" y1="40" x2="73" y2="40" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 3" opacity=".32"></line><line x1="27" y1="60" x2="73" y2="60" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 3" opacity=".32"></line><path d="M37 63c5 7 21 7 26 0" stroke-width="1.8"></path><path d="M41 65h18" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"></path></svg>

settings.title: Bite Alignment
settings.description: Your upper and lower teeth should meet naturally. Your bite is mapped so nothing feels off when you close.
settings.svg_code: <svg viewbox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 36C32 22 68 22 84 36"></path><path d="M24 37v9M34 35v12M45 34v13M55 34v13M66 35v12M76 37v9" stroke-width="1.1"></path><path d="M16 64C32 78 68 78 84 64"></path><path d="M24 63v-9M34 65v-12M45 66v-13M55 66v-13M66 65v-12M76 63v-9" stroke-width="1.1"></path><line x1="14" y1="50" x2="86" y2="50" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 3" opacity=".4"></line></svg>

settings.title: Tooth-by-Tooth Proportions
settings.description: Each tooth is sized individually, no uniform chiclet look. The side teeth sit slightly smaller than the front ones, the way real teeth do.

settings.title: Gumline Precision
settings.description: The edge where veneer meets gum is where cheap snap-ons give themselves away. Yours is contoured to your own gumline so it doesn't look applied.
settings.svg_code: <svg viewbox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M18 42C33 30 67 30 82 42" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"></path><path d="M34 40Q34 31 50 31Q66 31 66 40L62 73Q50 81 38 73Z"></path><path d="M34 40Q50 34 66 40" stroke-width="2.2"></path><line x1="66" y1="39" x2="82" y2="31" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"></line><circle cx="83" cy="30" r="1.7" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"></circle></svg>

settings.title: Natural Translucency
settings.description: Real teeth aren't flat white. The biting edges are built with graduated translucency so they catch light the way enamel does.
settings.svg_code: <svg viewbox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><defs><lineargradient id="pe" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0" stop-color="currentColor" stop-opacity=".42"></stop><stop offset="1" stop-color="currentColor" stop-opacity=".03"></stop></lineargradient></defs><path d="M33 20Q33 14 50 14Q67 14 67 20L71 72Q50 84 29 72Z" fill="url(#pe)" stroke="currentColor"></path><path d="M29 72Q50 84 71 72" stroke-width="2.2"></path><path d="M32 64Q50 73 68 64" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="2 2" opacity=".5"></path><line x1="50" y1="90" x2="50" y2="97" stroke-width="1" opacity=".5"></line><line x1="41" y1="89" x2="38" y2="95" stroke-width="1" opacity=".4"></line><line x1="59" y1="89" x2="62" y2="95" stroke-width="1" opacity=".4"></line></svg>

settings.title: Shade Matching
settings.description: Your shade card is matched against a professional shade guide, calibrated to your natural teeth, not a generic Hollywood white.
settings.svg_code: <svg viewbox="0 0 100 100" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><defs><lineargradient id="ps" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0" stop-color="currentColor" stop-opacity=".5"></stop><stop offset="1" stop-color="currentColor" stop-opacity=".06"></stop></lineargradient></defs><path d="M16 32Q16 28 22 28Q28 28 28 32L27 56Q22 60 17 56Z"></path><path d="M44 31Q44 27 50 27Q56 27 56 31L55 57Q50 61 45 57Z" stroke-width="1.9"></path><path d="M72 32Q72 28 78 28Q84 28 84 32L83 56Q78 60 73 56Z"></path><rect x="16" y="68" width="68" height="8" rx="4" fill="url(#ps)" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1"></rect><path d="M50 62l3.5 4.5h-7Z" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"></path></svg>

settings.title: Final Inspection
settings.description: Every finished case is checked against the first six points. If anything is off, it's remade before it ships, at our cost, not yours.

settings.heading: Seven decisions that make them look like your own teeth.
settings.description: Every case is designed against Dr. Turley's 7-Point Smile Design Protocol before it ships. Here's what that means for how yours looks.
settings.footer_text: Every case is designed against Dr. Turley's 7-Point Smile Design Protocol, the standard set by a practicing cosmetic dentist with 12+ years of experience. Nothing ships until it passes the protocol.

settings.title: Generic Snap-Ons
settings.feature_1: One mold. Every customer gets the same shape.
settings.feature_2: Visible gap where plastic meets the gum.
settings.feature_3: Every tooth identical. No individual shaping.
settings.feature_4: Ships in days because no one designed it.
settings.feature_5: No dentist involved, no design, no inspection.

settings.title: Revive Veneers
settings.feature_1: Thin and individually shaped, tooth by tooth.
settings.feature_2: Gumline contoured to your own anatomy.
settings.feature_3: Natural proportions and translucent edges, tooth by tooth.
settings.feature_4: 7 design checkpoints; 14–21 days of design work.
settings.feature_5: Designed against Dr. Turley's 7-point protocol. Every case.

settings.title: Porcelain veneers at a dentist
settings.description: Per arch. Multiple visits, drilling, and permanent removal of natural enamel.

settings.title: Revive Veneers
settings.description: Dentist-designed and custom-fit. Removable, no drilling, mailed to your door.

settings.title: Generic snap-ons online
settings.description: One-size mold, no dentist involved, the look most people quietly stop wearing.

settings.heading: The cheap snap-on you almost bought, next to the one you should.
settings.anchor_label: Where Revive sits on the smile-upgrade spectrum:

settings.title: Designed for you if:
settings.item_1: You have generally healthy teeth and gums
settings.item_2: You want to improve the look of stained, slightly gapped, or worn teeth
settings.item_3: You have all of your upper or all of your lower teeth

settings.title: Works for you, with a longer design timeline:
settings.item_1: Minor bite differences (slight overbite or underbite)
settings.item_2: Minor bite issues (slight overbite or underbite)
settings.item_3: Worn or short teeth from grinding
settings.item_4: One or two missing teeth, not at the end of the arch

settings.title: Check with your own dentist first if:
settings.item_1: You have active gum disease or significant gum recession
settings.item_2: You have a severe bite misalignment
settings.item_3: You've had major dental work in the last 3 months
settings.item_4: You're missing several teeth, or teeth at the end of the arch

settings.title: Revive isn't the right fit if:
settings.item_1: You have no remaining teeth in the arch you want covered
settings.item_3: You have an active oral infection or untreated gum disease

settings.heading: Is Revive Right for You?
settings.description: Revive Veneers work for most people, but not everyone. They're made for healthy teeth you want to look better, not for treating dental problems. Here's an honest look so you can decide.
settings.nudge_text: Not sure? Take our free quiz. We'll tell you honestly.
settings.disclaimer: Revive Veneers are cosmetic appliances, not medical devices. They enhance the appearance of your smile but do not treat dental conditions. Dr. Brandon Turley, DDS, recommends consulting a licensed dentist for any underlying dental health concerns before ordering.

settings.question: Should I get both arches or single arch?
settings.answer: Most buyers choose both arches because upper-only veneers can look unnatural when you smile or talk, your lower teeth show, and a color mismatch between veneered upper teeth and natural lower teeth looks off. We recommend both unless your lower teeth are already in good shape. At $1,994 for both vs. $1,297 for single, most people find the upgrade worth it.

settings.question: Is Revive right for me?
settings.answer: Most people are. Revive Veneers work well for anyone with healthy teeth and gums who wants to improve the appearance of stained, slightly gapped, or worn teeth. They aren't right for people with active gum disease, severe bite issues, multiple missing teeth at the end of the arch, or anyone currently wearing full dentures. Take our 60-second Smile Quiz above if you're unsure, it includes guidance on missing teeth and impression quality.

settings.question: What happens after I order?
settings.answer: Your impression kit ships within 48 hours. You take impressions at home (about 5 minutes), mail them back free, and your custom veneers arrive 2–3 weeks after we receive them. Every case is made to Dr. Turley's 7-Point Smile Design Protocol along the way. The kit includes two batches of putty, so if your first impressions don't capture enough detail we send a second kit free before production starts.

settings.question: Can I cancel after ordering?
settings.answer: Yes, cancel for a full refund any time before we begin production. Once your case is in production, the 30-Day Fit Guarantee covers you: if the fit or look isn't right, we remake it free (up to twice). Just email hello@reviveteeth.com.

settings.question: How long do the veneers last?
settings.answer: With everyday care, Revive Veneers are built to last 3–5 years. Rinse them after eating, brush them gently, and keep them in their case when they're out.

settings.question: Can I eat with them in?
settings.answer: Yes, they're made for everyday wear, including most meals. We recommend taking them out for very hard or sticky foods to keep them looking their best.

settings.heading: What people ask before buying
settings.description: The essentials are here. Anything else, we're one email away.
settings.help_text: Our team responds within one business day.

settings.heading: Ready to start your smile?
settings.description: Order your impression kit today and your custom veneers are designed within 2–3 weeks, from $1,297, or 3 interest-free payments. Backed by a 30-day money-back guarantee.<.p>
settings.reassurance: 30-day money-back guarantee · Free remakes until it's right
